programs.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days
programs.desc: Tensions erupt at the Tell All finale when explosive accusations come to light; Daniel confronts Lisa about cheating, Molly questions Sheena's future, Trish reveals the father of her baby, and Emma calls out Elise for crossing a line with a man she wants.

programs.title: Baylen Out Loud
programs.desc: Colin's surprising admission to Baylen throws a wrench in the wedding vision; Sammi and Burke don't hold back in sharing their opinions with Baylen; Allen concocts a master plan that he hopes Baylen will be on board with for her big day.

programs.title: Baylen Out Loud
programs.desc: Baylen hosts a sleepover for her brother, Bechnir; Allen and Julie seize the rare chance to have a date night; Bechnir confides in Baylen about his severe anxiety; Allen confronts the painful history behind his fierce protectiveness.

programs.title: Baylen Out Loud
programs.desc: Baylen's new tic about Colin's mom has her dreading their trip to Roanoke; Colin turns to his sister for advice on his career after the military; Julie and Allen discuss Bechnir's anxiety; Colin invites some surprising guests to a venue tour.

programs.title: Welcome to Plathville
programs.desc: Barry is ready to start dating for the first time in 25 years; Kim puts her trust in Lydia's hands; Ethan puts it all on the line in a make-or-break decision.

programs.title: Welcome to Plathville
programs.desc: Barry and Ken have an awkward exchange; Isaac is devastated over his decision to leave Kaylynn; Barry turns to a matchmaker as he embarks on his dating journey; Ethan decides the only way to get Teegan back is by doing something very unexpected.
